funding.summary: Cambium, a global high-performance materials innovator, announced it secured $100 million in Series B funding.
funding.use_of_proceeds: To accelerate the discovery and scaling of advanced materials, leveraging an AI-driven materials platform and integrated chemistry, materials science, biology, and manufacturing to deliver rapid scalable manufacturing across the US and Europe.
funding.why_it_matters: This investment indicates upcoming demand for lab supplies, reagents, consumables, and scientific equipment to support new production infrastructure, R&D capabilities, and manufacturing processes for advanced materials.

funding.summary: Cambium Biomaterials, Inc. announced the close of its $19 million Series A financing.
funding.use_of_proceeds: To redefine how advanced materials are discovered, designed, and manufactured, developing advanced materials for high-performance applications across land, air, sea, and space, including molecular innovation, AI-driven molecular design, chemistry, materials science, and biology.
funding.why_it_matters: This funding signals increased demand for lab supplies, reagents, and scientific equipment to support the company's R&D and manufacturing capabilities for advanced materials.

ai_summary: Cambium has secured substantial new funding, including $100 million Series B and $19 million Series A financing. This capital infusion signals significant growth and expansion for the high-performance materials and biomaterials innovator. For lab supply sales, this means increased R&D and production, driving higher demand for lab equipment, consumables, and services.
